name: VS. Jia Huan & Gubo | Limbus Company
description:
SPOILERS AHEAD!

_____________________________

VS THE FRAUDSTERS

(Yes, I know, the thumbnail sucks but there were no arts with them wearing their E.G.O gear)

This can be considered a filler bot, and my attempt at trying to implement Limbus game skills into a bot.

A few warnings:

This bot has spoilers for Canto 8 of Limbus Company, so don't use it if you did not play it.

This bot might suck, but from what I've chatted it kind of does the job of using their skills well, for the most part.

I heavily reccomend to use a proxy, as this is a pretty big bot regarding the tokens. The bot might confuse characters and appearances, so please don't get confused if that happens, either reroll or edit the message to your preferance. During my testing, I used 'Deepseek' proxy.

This takes place DURING the Family Hierarch Evaluations, basically in the middle of the whole thing.

ANY!POV. |

_____________________________

EXTRAS:

For characters like The Sinners, I did not write anything at all, I just told the bot to get info from the Limbus Company Wikipedia if the players mention them. Mainly since the bot focuses on Jia Huan and Gubo.
creator: Sussiebaka
